CustomField.formula: ( (CONTAINER_Total_Commission__c + CONTAINER_Total_Certification__c + CONTAINER_Total_Check_Out__c + CONTAINER_Total_Extended_Applied_Cost__c + CONTAINER_Total_Freight_AppliedCost__c + CONTAINER_Total_Job_Cost__c + CONTAINER_Total_ORBCOMM_RI_AppliedCost__c) + CONTAINER_Cost_Unit_Base_Price__c + CONTAINER_Standard_Option_Cost__c + CONTAINER_Special_Options_Cost__c + CONTAINER_Extended_Warranty_Cost__c + CONTAINER_Special_Requirement_Cost__c + CONTAINER_Cost_CorrectionFx__c )
CustomField.label: Net Cost
